name: Simple ESG Cost Savings
short_description: Calculates total cost savings over a specified period, based on a constant monthly saving amount from an ESG-related project.

inputs.name: monthly_savings
inputs.description: Monthly cost savings in dollars

inputs.name: months
inputs.description: Duration of savings in months

name: Green Bond Yield Calculation with Simple Interest
short_description: Calculates the total simple interest earned on a green bond investment over a specified number of years.

inputs.name: principal
inputs.description: The initial investment amount in green bonds.

inputs.name: rate
inputs.description: The simple annual yield in percent.

inputs.name: years
inputs.description: The number of years the investment is held.

name: Dual ESG Savings: Energy & Water Initiatives
short_description: Calculates the net annual savings from dual ESG initiatives (energy and water) by accounting for monthly savings, annual maintenance costs, and a government incentive.

inputs.name: monthly_energy_savings
inputs.description: Monthly savings from energy efficiency improvements.

inputs.name: monthly_water_savings
inputs.description: Monthly savings from water conservation efforts.

inputs.name: annual_maintenance_cost
inputs.description: Annual cost incurred for system maintenance.

inputs.name: government_incentive
inputs.description: One-time annual government incentive received.

name: ESG Project ROI Calculation
short_description: Calculates the Return on Investment (ROI) for an ESG project based on initial investment, monthly energy savings, annual operating costs, and annual tax incentives over a specified number of years.

inputs.name: initial_investment
inputs.description: The initial capital expenditure for the ESG project.

inputs.name: monthly_energy_savings
inputs.description: The monthly energy cost savings generated by the project.

inputs.name: annual_operating_cost
inputs.description: The recurring annual cost to operate the project.

inputs.name: annual_tax_incentive
inputs.description: The annual tax incentive or rebate received for the project.

inputs.name: years
inputs.description: The total duration of the project in years.

name: ESG Multi-Factor Synergy Net Benefit
short_description: Advanced: Multi-Factor ESG Synergy Calculation with Tax Credits and Efficiency Gains.

inputs.name: initial_cost
inputs.description: Initial investment cost of the sustainability project

inputs.name: monthly_energy_savings
inputs.description: Monthly savings from energy efficiency

inputs.name: annual_tax_credit
inputs.description: Annual tax credit received for the project

inputs.name: operating_costs
inputs.description: Annual operating costs before efficiency improvements

inputs.name: efficiency_improvement_rate
inputs.description: Percentage reduction in operating costs due to efficiency gains (e.g., 5 for 5%)

inputs.name: years
inputs.description: Project duration in years
